issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1458: remaining Python asset sweep 8/10

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1458 changes, and the non-interactive push attempt to `origin/BIG-GO-1458` timed out without returning a transport or authentication result.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
Baseline main SHA observed via ls-remote was `aeab7a1e`.
Repository-wide and priority-directory Python inventory commands both returned no output on 2026-04-06.
Local lane commit `7133eaa3` authored the zero-Python sweep artifacts.
Local lane commit `9a9a7a6d` finalized validation and status metadata.
A timed non-interactive `git push -u origin BIG-GO-1458` attempt did not complete in this environment.
